name: condMutualInfo_nonneg
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) {Z : Ω → U} {μ : Measure Ω} [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] : 0 ≤ I[X : Y | Z ; μ]
docstring: Conditional information is non-nonegative.

name: condMutualInfo_comm
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (Z : Ω → U) (μ : Measure Ω) : I[X : Y | Z ; μ] = I[Y : X | Z ; μ]
docstring: `I[X : Y | Z] = I[Y : X | Z]`.

name: condMutualInfo_eq
signature: [Countable U] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange Z] : I[X : Y | Z ; μ] = H[X | Z ; μ] + H[Y | Z; μ] - H[⟨X, Y⟩ | Z ; μ]
docstring: `I[X : Y| Z] = H[X| Z] + H[Y| Z] - H[X, Y| Z]`.

name: condMutualInfo_eq'
signature: [Countable U] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : I[X : Y | Z ; μ] = H[X | Z ; μ] - H[X | ⟨Y, Z⟩ ; μ]
docstring: `I[X : Y| Z] = H[X| Z] - H[X|Y, Z]`.

name: condMutualInfo_of_inj_map
signature: [Countable U] [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) {V : Type*} [MeasurableSpace V] [MeasurableSingletonClass V] [Countable V] (f : U → S → V) (hf : ∀ t, Function.Injective (f t)) [FiniteRange Z] : I[fun ω ↦ f (Z ω) (X ω) : Y | Z ; μ] = I[X : Y | Z ; μ]
docstring: If `f(Z, X)` is injective for each fixed `Z`, then `I[f(Z, X) : Y| Z] = I[X : Y| Z]`.

name: condMutualInfo_of_inj
signature: [Countable U] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] {V : Type*} [MeasurableSpace V] [MeasurableSingletonClass V] [Countable V] {f : U → V} (hf : Function.Injective f) : I[X : Y | f ∘ Z; μ] = I[X : Y | Z; μ]

name: condMutualInfo_of_inj'
signature: {S T U S' T' U' Ω : Type*} [mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω] [MeasurableSpace S] [MeasurableSingletonClass S] [Countable S] [MeasurableSpace T] [MeasurableSingletonClass T] [Countable T] [MeasurableSpace U] [MeasurableSingletonClass U] [Countable U] [MeasurableSpace S'] [MeasurableSingletonClass S'] [Countable S'] [MeasurableSpace T'] [MeasurableSingletonClass T'] [Countable T'] [MeasurableSpace U'] [MeasurableSingletonClass U'] [Countable U'] {X : Ω → S} {Y : Ω → T} {Z : Ω → U} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] {f : S → S'} (hf : Function.Injective f) {g : T → T'} (hg : Function.Injective g) {h : U → U'} (hh : Function.Injective h) : I[f ∘ X : g ∘ Y | h ∘ Z; μ] = I[X : Y | Z; μ]

name: condEntropy_prod_eq_of_indepFun
signature: [Finite T] [Finite U] [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange X] (h : IndepFun (⟨X, Y⟩) Z μ) : H[X | ⟨Y, Z⟩ ; μ] = H[X | Y ; μ]

name: condMutualInfo_eq_zero
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : I[X : Y | Z ; μ] = 0 ↔ CondIndepFun X Y Z μ
docstring: `I[X : Y| Z]=0` iff `X, Y` are conditionally independent over `Z`.

name: ent_of_cond_indep
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : CondIndepFun X Y Z μ) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : H[⟨X, ⟨Y, Z⟩⟩ ; μ] = H[⟨X, Z⟩; μ] + H[⟨Y, Z⟩; μ] - H[Z; μ]
docstring: If `X, Y` are conditionally independent over `Z`, then `H[X, Y, Z] = H[X, Z] + H[Y, Z] - H[Z]`.

name: entropy_sub_condEntropy
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] : H[X ; μ] - H[X | Y ; μ] = I[X : Y ; μ]
docstring: `H[X] - H[X|Y] = I[X : Y]`

name: condEntropy_le_entropy
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] : H[X | Y ; μ] ≤ H[X ; μ]

name: entropy_submodular
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : H[X | ⟨Y, Z⟩ ; μ] ≤ H[X | Z ; μ]

name: condEntropy_comp_ge
signature: [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] (μ : Measure Ω) [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (f : S → U) : H[Y | f ∘ X ; μ] ≥ H[Y | X; μ]
docstring:
Data-processing inequality for the conditional entropy: `H[Y|f(X)] ≥ H[Y|X]`
To upgrade this to equality, see `condEntropy_of_injective'`

name: entropy_triple_add_entropy_le
signature: (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : H[⟨X, ⟨Y, Z⟩⟩ ; μ] + H[Z ; μ] ≤ H[⟨X, Z⟩ ; μ] + H[⟨Y, Z⟩ ; μ]
docstring: The submodularity inequality: `H[X, Y, Z] + H[Z] ≤ H[X, Z] + H[Y, Z]`.

name: mutual_comp_le
signature: [Countable U] (μ : Measure Ω) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (f : S → U) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] : I[f ∘ X : Y ; μ] ≤ I[X : Y ; μ]
docstring:
Let `X, Y`be random variables. For any function `f, g` on the range of `X`, we have
`I[f(X) : Y] ≤ I[X : Y]`.

name: mutual_comp_comp_le
signature: [Countable U] (μ : Measure Ω) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (f : S → U) (g : T → V) (hg : Measurable g) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] : I[f ∘ X : g ∘ Y ; μ] ≤ I[X : Y ; μ]
docstring:
Let `X, Y` be random variables. For any functions `f, g` on the ranges of `X, Y` respectively,
we have `I[f ∘ X : g ∘ Y ; μ] ≤ I[X : Y ; μ]`.

name: condMutual_comp_comp_le
signature: (μ : Measure Ω) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (f : S → V) (g : T → W) (hg : Measurable g) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : I[f ∘ X : g ∘ Y | Z ; μ] ≤ I[X : Y | Z ; μ]
docstring:
Let `X, Y, Z`. For any functions `f, g` on the ranges of `X, Y` respectively,
we have `I[f ∘ X : g ∘ Y | Z ; μ] ≤ I[X : Y | Z ; μ]`.

name: continuous_measureEntropy_probabilityMeasure
signature: {Ω : Type*} [Finite Ω] [TopologicalSpace Ω] [DiscreteTopology Ω] [MeasurableSpace Ω] [OpensMeasurableSpace Ω] : Continuous (fun (μ : ProbabilityMeasure Ω) ↦ measureEntropy (S := Ω) μ)
docstring: Entropy depends continuously on the measure.

name: continuous_entropy_restrict_probabilityMeasure
signature: [Finite G] [TopologicalSpace G] [DiscreteTopology G] [BorelSpace G] : Continuous (fun (μ : ProbabilityMeasure G) ↦ H[id ; μ.toMeasure])

name: rdist
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω' → G) (μ : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) (μ' : Measure Ω' := by volume_tac) : ℝ

name: rdist_def
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω' → G) (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = H[fun x ↦ x.1 - x.2 ; (μ.map X).prod (μ'.map Y)] - H[X ; μ]/2 - H[Y ; μ']/2
docstring: Explicit formula for the Ruzsa distance.

name: rdist_eq_rdistm
signature: : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = Kernel.rdistm (μ.map X) (μ'.map Y)
docstring: Ruzsa distance of random variables equals Ruzsa distance of the kernels.

name: continuous_rdist_restrict_probabilityMeasure
signature: [Finite G] [TopologicalSpace G] [DiscreteTopology G] [BorelSpace G] : Continuous (fun (μ : ProbabilityMeasure G × ProbabilityMeasure G) ↦ d[id ; μ.1.toMeasure # id ; μ.2.toMeasure])
docstring: Ruzsa distance depends continuously on the measure.

name: continuous_rdist_restrict_probabilityMeasure₁
signature: [Finite G] [TopologicalSpace G] [DiscreteTopology G] [BorelSpace G] (X : Ω → G) (P : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) [IsProbabilityMeasure P] (X_mble : Measurable X) : Continuous (fun (μ : ProbabilityMeasure G) ↦ d[id ; P.map X # id ; μ.toMeasure])

name: rdist_eq_rdist_id_map
signature: : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = d[id ; μ.map X # id ; μ'.map Y]
docstring: Ruzsa distance between random variables equals Ruzsa distance between their distributions.

name: continuous_rdist_restrict_probabilityMeasure₁'
signature: [Finite G] [TopologicalSpace G] [DiscreteTopology G] [BorelSpace G] (X : Ω → G) (P : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) [IsProbabilityMeasure P] (X_mble : Measurable X) : Continuous (fun (μ : ProbabilityMeasure G) ↦ d[X ; P # id ; μ.toMeasure])
docstring: Ruzsa distance depends continuously on the second measure.

name: rdist_congr
signature: {X' : Ω'' → G} {Y' : Ω''' → G} (hX : IdentDistrib X X' μ μ'') (hY : IdentDistrib Y Y' μ' μ''') : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = d[X' ; μ'' # Y' ; μ''']
docstring: If `X', Y'` are copies of `X, Y` respectively then `d[X' ; Y'] = d[X ; Y]`.

name: rdist_congr_left
signature: {X' : Ω'' → G} (hY : AEMeasurable Y μ') (hX : IdentDistrib X X' μ μ'') : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = d[X' ; μ'' # Y ; μ']
docstring: If `X', Y'` are copies of `X, Y` respectively then `d[X' ; Y'] = d[X ; Y]`.

name: rdist_congr_right
signature: {Y' : Ω''' → G} (hX : AEMeasurable X μ) (hY : IdentDistrib Y Y' μ' μ''') : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y' ; μ''']
docstring: If `X', Y'` are copies of `X, Y` respectively then `d[X' ; Y'] = d[X ; Y]`.

name: tendsto_rdist_probabilityMeasure
signature: {α : Type*} {l : Filter α} [TopologicalSpace Ω] [BorelSpace Ω] [TopologicalSpace G] [BorelSpace G] [Finite G] [DiscreteTopology G] {X Y : Ω → G} (hX : Continuous X) (hY : Continuous Y) {μ : α → ProbabilityMeasure Ω} {ν : ProbabilityMeasure Ω} (hμ : Tendsto μ l (𝓝 ν)) : Tendsto (fun n ↦ d[X ; (μ n : Measure Ω) # Y ; (μ n : Measure Ω)]) l (𝓝 (d[X ; ν # Y ; ν]))

name: rdist_eq
signature: [IsFiniteMeasure μ] {Y : Ω → G} (h : IndepFun X Y μ) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ] = H[X - Y ; μ] - H[X ; μ]/2 - H[Y ; μ]/2
docstring: If `X, Y` are independent `G`-random variables then `d[X ; Y] = H[X - Y] - H[X]/2 - H[Y]/2`.

name: rdist_le_avg_ent
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (μ : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) (μ' : Measure Ω' := by volume_tac) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] ≤ (H[X ; μ] + H[Y ; μ'])/2

name: rdist_of_inj
signature: {H : Type*} [hH : MeasurableSpace H] [MeasurableSingletonClass H] [AddCommGroup H] [Countable H] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (φ : G →+ H) (hφ : Injective φ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] : d[φ ∘ X ; μ # φ ∘ Y ; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y ; μ']
docstring: Applying an injective homomorphism does not affect Ruzsa distance.

name: rdist_zero_eq_half_ent
signature: [IsFiniteMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] : d[X ; μ # fun _ ↦ 0 ; μ'] = H[X ; μ]/2

name: rdist_symm
signature: [IsFiniteMeasure μ] [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] : d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] = d[Y ; μ' # X ; μ]
docstring: `d[X ; Y] = d[Y ; X]`

name: continuous_rdist_restrict_probabilityMeasure₁_left
signature: [Finite G] [TopologicalSpace G] [DiscreteTopology G] [BorelSpace G] (X : Ω → G) (P : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) [IsProbabilityMeasure P] (X_mble : Measurable X) : Continuous (fun (μ : ProbabilityMeasure G) ↦ d[id ; μ.toMeasure # X ; P])
docstring: Ruzsa distance depends continuously on the first measure.

name: diff_ent_le_rdist
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) : |H[X ; μ] - H[Y ; μ']| ≤ 2 * d[X ; μ # Y ; μ']

name: diff_ent_le_rdist'
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {Y : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (h : IndepFun X Y μ) [FiniteRange Y] : H[X - Y ; μ] - H[X ; μ] ≤ 2 * d[X ; μ # Y ; μ]

name: diff_ent_le_rdist''
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {Y : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (h : IndepFun X Y μ) [FiniteRange Y] : H[X - Y ; μ] - H[Y ; μ] ≤ 2 * d[X ; μ # Y ; μ]

name: rdist_nonneg
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) : 0 ≤ d[X ; μ # Y ; μ']

name: ent_of_proj_le
signature: {UH : Ω' → G} [FiniteRange UH] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hU : Measurable UH) {H : AddSubgroup G} (hH : Set.Finite (H : Set G)) (hunif : IsUniform H UH μ') : H[(QuotientAddGroup.mk' H) ∘ X; μ] ≤ 2 * d[X; μ # UH ; μ']
docstring:
If $G$ is an additive group and $X$ is a $G$-valued random variable and
$H\leq G$ is a finite subgroup then, with $\pi:G\to G/H$ the natural homomorphism we have
(where $U_H$ is uniform on $H$) $\mathbb{H}(\pi(X))\leq 2d[X;U_H].$

name: rdist_add_const
signature: [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) {c} : d[X ; μ # Y + fun _ ↦ c; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y ; μ']
docstring: Adding a constant to a random variable does not change the Rusza distance.

name: rdist_add_const'
signature: [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ'] (c : G) (c' : G) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) : d[X + fun _ ↦ c; μ # Y + fun _ ↦ c'; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y ; μ']
docstring: A variant of `rdist_add_const` where one adds constants to both variables.

name: ent_of_diff_le
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω → G) (Z : Ω → G) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun (⟨X, Y⟩) Z μ) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : H[X - Y; μ] ≤ H[X - Z; μ] + H[Z - Y; μ] - H[Z; μ]
docstring: The **improved entropic Ruzsa triangle inequality**.

name: rdist_triangle
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω'' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) [hμ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [hμ' : IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] [hμ'' : IsProbabilityMeasure μ''] [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z] : d[X ; μ # Z ; μ''] ≤ d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] + d[Y ; μ' # Z ; μ'']
docstring: The **entropic Ruzsa triangle inequality**

name: condRuzsaDist
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Z : Ω → S) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) [IsFiniteMeasure μ] (μ' : Measure Ω' := by volume_tac) [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] : ℝ

name: condRuzsaDist_def
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Z : Ω → S) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsFiniteMeasure μ] (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = dk[condDistrib X Z μ ; μ.map Z # condDistrib Y W μ' ; μ'.map W]

name: condRuszaDist_zero_right
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Z : Ω → S) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsFiniteMeasure μ] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; 0] = 0

name: condRuszaDist_zero_left
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Z : Ω → S) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] : d[X | Z ; 0 # Y | W ; μ'] = 0

name: condRuzsaDist_eq_sum'
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Z : Ω → S} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} (hX : Measurable X) (hZ : Measurable Z) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsFiniteMeasure μ] (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [Fintype S] [Fintype T] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = ∑ z, ∑ w, μ.real (Z ⁻¹' {z}) * μ'.real (W ⁻¹' {w}) * d[X ; (μ[|Z ← z]) # Y ; (μ'[|W ← w])]
docstring: Explicit formula for conditional Ruzsa distance $d[X|Z; Y|W]$ in a fintype.

name: condRuzsaDist_eq_sum
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Z : Ω → S} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} (hX : Measurable X) (hZ : Measurable Z) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsFiniteMeasure μ] (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange W] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = ∑ z ∈ FiniteRange.toFinset Z, ∑ w ∈ FiniteRange.toFinset W, μ.real (Z ⁻¹' {z}) * μ'.real (W ⁻¹' {w}) * d[X ; (μ[|Z ← z]) # Y ; (μ'[|W ← w])]
docstring: Explicit formula for conditional Ruzsa distance $d[X|Z; Y|W]$.

name: condRuzsaDist_symm
signature: [Countable T] {X : Ω → G} {Z : Ω → S} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} (hZ : Measurable Z) (hW : Measurable W) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange W] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = d[Y | W ; μ' # X | Z ; μ]
docstring: $$ d[X|Z; Y|W] = d[Y|W; X|Z]$$

name: condRuzsaDist_nonneg
signature: [Countable T] {X : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) [FiniteRange X] {Z : Ω → S} (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange Z] {Y : Ω' → G} (hY : Measurable Y) [FiniteRange Y] {W : Ω' → T} (hW : Measurable W) [FiniteRange W] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] : 0 ≤ d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ']

name: condRuzsaDist'
signature: (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ : Measure Ω := by volume_tac) (μ' : Measure Ω' := by volume_tac) [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] : ℝ

name: condRuzsaDist'_def
signature: {T : Type*} [MeasurableSpace T] (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = dk[Kernel.const Unit (μ.map X) ; Measure.dirac () # condDistrib Y W μ' ; μ'.map W]
docstring: Conditional Ruzsa distance equals Ruzsa distance of associated kernels.

name: condRuzsaDist'_zero_right
signature: {T : Type*} [MeasurableSpace T] (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (μ : Measure Ω) : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; 0] = 0

name: condRuzsaDist'_eq_sum
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [FiniteRange W] : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = ∑ w ∈ FiniteRange.toFinset W, μ'.real (W ⁻¹' {w}) * d[X ; μ # Y ; (μ'[|W ← w])]
docstring: Explicit formula for conditional Ruzsa distance `d[X ; Y | W]`.

name: condRuzsaDist'_eq_sum'
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [Fintype T] : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = ∑ w, μ'.real (W ⁻¹' {w}) * d[X ; μ # Y ; (μ'[|W ← w])]
docstring: Alternate formula for conditional Ruzsa distance `d[X ; Y | W]` when T is a Fintype.

name: condRuzsaDist'_prod_eq_sum
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W W' : Ω' → T} (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') (hY : Measurable Y) (hW' : Measurable W') (hW : Measurable W) [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [FiniteRange W] [FiniteRange W'] : d[X ; μ # Y | ⟨W', W⟩; μ'] = ∑ w ∈ FiniteRange.toFinset W, μ'.real (W ⁻¹' {w}) * d[X ; μ # Y | W' ; (μ'[|W ← w])]

name: condRuzsaDist'_prod_eq_sum'
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W W' : Ω' → T} (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') (hY : Measurable Y) (hW' : Measurable W') (hW : Measurable W) [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [Fintype T] : d[X ; μ # Y | ⟨W', W⟩; μ'] = ∑ w, μ'.real (W ⁻¹' {w}) * d[X ; μ # Y | W' ; (μ'[|W ← w])]
docstring: Version of `condRuzsaDist'_prod_eq_sum` when `W` has finite codomain.

name: condRuzsaDist'_eq_integral
signature: (X : Ω → G) {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) (μ' : Measure Ω') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [FiniteRange W] : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = (μ'.map W)[fun w ↦ d[X ; μ # Y ; (μ'[|W ← w])]]
docstring: Explicit formula for conditional Ruzsa distance `d[X ; Y | W]`, in integral form.

name: condRuzsaDist_of_const
signature: {X : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (c : S) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] [FiniteRange W] : d[X|(fun _ ↦ c) ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ']
docstring: Conditioning by a constant does not affect Ruzsa distance.

name: condRuzsaDist_of_indep
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Z : Ω → S} {Y : Ω → G} {W : Ω → T} (hX : Measurable X) (hZ : Measurable Z) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] (h : IndepFun (⟨X, Z⟩) (⟨Y, W⟩) μ) [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange W] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ] = H[X - Y | ⟨Z, W⟩ ; μ] - H[X | Z ; μ]/2 - H[Y | W ; μ]/2
docstring:
If `$(X,Z)$` and `$(Y,W)$` are independent, then
`d[X | Z ; Y | W] = H[X'- Y' | Z', W'] - H[X'|Z']/2 - H[Y'|W']/2`.

name: condRuzsaDist'_of_indep
signature: {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω → G} {W : Ω → T} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (μ : Measure Ω) [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] (h : IndepFun X (⟨Y, W⟩) μ) [FiniteRange W] : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ] = H[X - Y | W ; μ] - H[X ; μ]/2 - H[Y | W ; μ]/2
docstring: Formula for conditional Ruzsa distance for independent sets of variables.

name: condRuzsaDist_of_copy
signature: {X : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) {Z : Ω → S} (hZ : Measurable Z) {Y : Ω' → G} (hY : Measurable Y) {W : Ω' → T} (hW : Measurable W) {X' : Ω'' → G} (hX' : Measurable X') {Z' : Ω'' → S} (hZ' : Measurable Z') {Y' : Ω''' → G} (hY' : Measurable Y') {W' : Ω''' → T} (hW' : Measurable W') [IsFiniteMeasure μ] [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [IsFiniteMeasure μ''] [IsFiniteMeasure μ'''] (h1 : IdentDistrib (⟨X, Z⟩) (⟨X', Z'⟩) μ μ'') (h2 : IdentDistrib (⟨Y, W⟩) (⟨Y', W'⟩) μ' μ''') [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange W] [FiniteRange Z'] [FiniteRange W'] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = d[X' | Z' ; μ'' # Y' | W' ; μ''']
docstring:
The conditional Ruzsa distance is unchanged if the sets of random variables are replaced with
copies.

name: condRuzsaDist'_of_copy
signature: (X : Ω → G) {Y : Ω' → G} (hY : Measurable Y) {W : Ω' → T} (hW : Measurable W) (X' : Ω'' → G) {Y' : Ω''' → G} (hY' : Measurable Y') {W' : Ω''' → T} (hW' : Measurable W') [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] [IsFiniteMeasure μ'''] (h1 : IdentDistrib X X' μ μ'') (h2 : IdentDistrib (⟨Y, W⟩) (⟨Y', W'⟩) μ' μ''') [FiniteRange W] [FiniteRange W'] : d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ'] = d[X' ; μ'' # Y' | W' ; μ''']

name: condRuszaDist_prod_eq_of_indepFun
signature: {μ : Measure Ω} {μ' : Measure Ω'} {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W W' : Ω' → T} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (hW' : Measurable W') (h : IndepFun (⟨Y, W⟩) W' μ') [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] [Finite T] : d[X ; μ # Y | ⟨W, W'⟩ ; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ']

name: condRuzsaDist_comp_right
signature: {T' : Type*} [Finite T] [Finite T'] [MeasurableSpace T'] [MeasurableSingletonClass T'] [IsFiniteMeasure μ'] (X : Ω → G) (Y : Ω' → G) (W : Ω' → T) (e : T → T') (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (he : Measurable e) (h'e : Injective e) : d[X ; μ # Y | e ∘ W ; μ'] = d[X ; μ # Y | W ; μ']

name: condRuzsaDist_of_inj_map
signature: {G' : Type*} [Countable G'] [AddCommGroup G'] [MeasurableSpace G'] [MeasurableSingletonClass G'] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] (Y : Fin 4 → Ω → G) (h_indep : IndepFun (⟨Y 0, Y 2⟩) (⟨Y 1, Y 3⟩) μ) (h_meas : ∀ i, Measurable (Y i)) (π : G × G →+ G') (hπ : ∀ (h : G), Injective (fun g ↦ π (g, h))) [FiniteRange (Y 2)] [FiniteRange (Y 3)] : d[π ∘ ⟨Y 0, Y 2⟩ | Y 2 ; μ # π ∘ ⟨Y 1, Y 3⟩ | Y 3 ; μ] = d[Y 0 | Y 2 ; μ # Y 1 | Y 3 ; μ]

name: condRuzsaDist'_of_inj_map
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [Module (ZMod 2) G] {X B C : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hB : Measurable B) (hC : Measurable C) (h_indep : IndepFun X (⟨B, C⟩) μ) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange B] [FiniteRange C] : d[X ; μ # B | B + C ; μ] = d[X ; μ # C | B + C ; μ]

name: condRuzsaDist'_of_inj_map'
signature: [Module (ZMod 2) G] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ''] {A : Ω'' → G} {B C : Ω → G} (hA : Measurable A) (hB : Measurable B) (hC : Measurable C) [FiniteRange A] [FiniteRange B] [FiniteRange C] : d[A ; μ'' # B | B + C ; μ] = d[A ; μ'' # C | B + C ; μ]

name: kaimanovich_vershik
signature: {X Y Z : Ω → G} (h : iIndepFun ![X, Y, Z] μ) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : H[X + Y + Z ; μ] - H[X + Y ; μ] ≤ H[Y + Z ; μ] - H[Y ; μ]
docstring: The **Kaimanovich-Vershik inequality**. `H[X + Y + Z] - H[X + Y] ≤ H[Y + Z] - H[Y]`.

name: kaimanovich_vershik'
signature: {X Y Z : Ω → G} (h : iIndepFun ![X, Y, Z] μ) (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : H[X - (Y + Z) ; μ] - H[X - Y ; μ] ≤ H[Y + Z ; μ] - H[Y ; μ]
docstring: A version of the **Kaimanovich-Vershik inequality** with some variables negated.

name: ent_bsg
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] {A B : Ω → G} (hA : Measurable A) (hB : Measurable B) [Finite G] : (μ.map (A + B))[fun z ↦ d[A ; μ[|(A + B) ⁻¹' {z}] # B ; μ[|(A + B) ⁻¹' {z}]]] ≤ 3 * I[A : B; μ] + 2 * H[A + B ; μ] - H[A ; μ] - H[B ; μ]
docstring:
The **entropic Balog-Szemerédi-Gowers inequality**. Let `A, B` be `G`-valued random variables on
`Ω`, and set `Z := A+B`. Then
`∑ z, P[Z=z] d[(A | Z = z) ; (B | Z = z)] ≤ 3 I[A :B] + 2 H[Z] - H[A] - H[B].`
TODO: remove the hypothesis of `Fintype G` from here and from `condIndep_copies'`

name: condRuzsaDist_le
signature: [Countable T] {X : Ω → G} {Z : Ω → S} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hZ : Measurable Z) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange W] : d[X | Z ; μ # Y|W ; μ'] ≤ d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] + I[X : Z ; μ]/2 + I[Y : W ; μ']/2
docstring:
Suppose that $(X, Z)$ and $(Y, W)$ are random variables, where $X, Y$ take values in an abelian
group. Then $$d[X | Z ; Y | W] \leq d[X ; Y] + \tfrac{1}{2} I[X : Z] + \tfrac{1}{2} I[Y : W]$$

name: condRuzsaDist_le'
signature: [Countable T] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W : Ω' → T} [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange W] : d[X ; μ # Y|W ; μ'] ≤ d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] + I[Y : W ; μ']/2

name: condRuzsaDist_le'_prod
signature: [Countable T] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {W Z : Ω' → T} [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hW : Measurable W) (hZ : Measurable Z) [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange W] [FiniteRange Z] : d[X ; μ # Y|⟨W, Z⟩ ; μ'] ≤ d[X ; μ # Y|Z ; μ'] + I[Y : W | Z ; μ']/2

name: comparison_of_ruzsa_distances
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun Y Z μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : d[X ; μ # Y+ Z ; μ'] - d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] ≤ (H[Y + Z; μ'] - H[Y; μ']) / 2 ∧ (Module (ZMod 2) G → H[Y + Z; μ'] - H[Y; μ'] = d[Y; μ' # Z; μ'] + H[Z; μ'] / 2 - H[Y; μ'] / 2)

name: condRuzsaDist_diff_le
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun Y Z μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : d[X ; μ # Y+ Z ; μ'] - d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] ≤ (H[Y + Z; μ'] - H[Y; μ']) / 2
docstring:
Let `X, Y, Z` be random variables taking values in some abelian group, and with `Y, Z`
independent. Then we have
`d[X ; Y + Z] - d[X ; Y] ≤ 1/2 (H[Y+ Z] - H[Y])`
$$= \tfrac{1}{2} d[Y ; Z] + \tfrac{1}{4} H[Z] - \tfrac{1}{4} H[Y]$$
and
$$d[X ; Y|Y+ Z] - d[X ; Y] \leq \tfrac{1}{2} \bigl(H[Y+ Z] - H[Z]\bigr)$$
$$= \tfrac{1}{2} d[Y ; Z] + \tfrac{1}{4} H[Y] - \tfrac{1}{4} H[Z]$$

name: entropy_sub_entropy_eq_condRuzsaDist_add
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun Y Z μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : H[Y + Z; μ'] - H[Y; μ'] = d[Y; μ' # Z; μ'] + H[Z; μ'] / 2 - H[Y; μ'] / 2

name: condRuzsaDist_diff_le'
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun Y Z μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : d[X ; μ # Y + Z; μ'] - d[X ; μ # Y; μ'] ≤ d[Y; μ' # Z; μ'] / 2 + H[Z; μ'] / 4 - H[Y; μ'] / 4

name: condRuzsaDist_diff_le''
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun Y Z μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : d[X ; μ # Y|Y+ Z ; μ'] - d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] ≤ (H[Y+ Z ; μ'] - H[Z ; μ'])/2

name: condRuzsaDist_diff_le'''
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y : Ω' → G} {Z : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (h : IndepFun Y Z μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] : d[X ; μ # Y|Y+ Z ; μ'] - d[X ; μ # Y ; μ'] ≤ d[Y ; μ' # Z ; μ']/2 + H[Y ; μ']/4 - H[Z ; μ']/4

name: condRuzsaDist_diff_ofsum_le
signature: [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] {X : Ω → G} {Y Z Z' : Ω' → G} (hX : Measurable X) (hY : Measurable Y) (hZ : Measurable Z) (hZ' : Measurable Z') (h : iIndepFun ![Y, Z, Z'] μ') [FiniteRange X] [FiniteRange Z] [FiniteRange Y] [FiniteRange Z'] : d[X ; μ # Y + Z | Y + Z + Z'; μ'] - d[X ; μ # Y; μ'] ≤ (H[Y + Z + Z'; μ'] + H[Y + Z; μ'] - H[Y ; μ'] - H[Z' ; μ'])/2

name: measureEntropy
signature: (μ : Measure S := by volume_tac) : ℝ

name: integral_congr_finiteSupport

signature: [MeasurableSingletonClass S] [Countable S] [MeasurableSingletonClass T] [Countable T] [MeasurableSingletonClass U] {μ} [IsFiniteMeasure μ] {κ : Kernel T S} [IsZeroOrMarkovKernel κ] {η : Kernel (T × S) U} [IsMarkovKernel η] [FiniteSupport μ] (hκ : FiniteKernelSupport κ) (hη : FiniteKernelSupport η) : Hk[κ ⊗ₖ η, μ] = Hk[κ, μ] + Hk[η, μ ⊗ₘ κ]

name: chain_rule
signature: [Countable S] [MeasurableSingletonClass S] [Countable T] [MeasurableSingletonClass T] [Countable U] [MeasurableSingletonClass U] {κ : Kernel T (S × U)} [IsZeroOrMarkovKernel κ] [hU : Nonempty U] {μ : Measure T} [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteSupport μ] (hκ : AEFiniteKernelSupport κ μ) : Hk[κ, μ] = Hk[fst κ, μ] + Hk[condKernel κ, μ ⊗ₘ (fst κ)]

name: chain_rule'
signature: [Nonempty S] [Countable S] [MeasurableSingletonClass S] [Countable T] [MeasurableSingletonClass T] [Countable U] [MeasurableSingletonClass U] {κ : Kernel T (S × U)} [IsZeroOrMarkovKernel κ] {μ : Measure T} [IsZeroOrProbabilityMeasure μ] [FiniteSupport μ] (hκ : AEFiniteKernelSupport κ μ) : Hk[κ, μ] = Hk[snd κ, μ] + Hk[condKernel (swapRight κ), μ ⊗ₘ (snd κ)]

name: rdist_eq
signature: {κ : Kernel T G} {η : Kernel T' G} {μ : Measure T} {ν : Measure T'} [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure ν] [FiniteSupport μ] [FiniteSupport ν] : dk[κ ; μ # η ; ν] = (μ.prod ν)[fun p ↦ Hm[((κ p.1).prod (η p.2)).map (fun x ↦ x.1 - x.2)]] - Hk[κ, μ]/2 - Hk[η, ν]/2

signature: {κ : Kernel T G} {η : Kernel T' G} [IsFiniteKernel κ] [IsFiniteKernel η] {μ : Measure T} {ν : Measure T'} [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure ν] [FiniteSupport μ] [FiniteSupport ν] : dk[κ ; μ # η ; ν] = Hk[map ((prodMkRight T' κ) ×ₖ (prodMkLeft T η)) (fun x ↦ x.1 - x.2), μ.prod ν] - Hk[κ, μ]/2 - Hk[η, ν]/2

name: rdist_triangle_aux1

name: rdist_triangle_aux2
signature: (η : Kernel T' G) (ξ : Kernel T'' G) [IsMarkovKernel η] [IsMarkovKernel ξ] (μ : Measure T) (μ' : Measure T') (μ'' : Measure T'') [IsProbabilityMeasure μ] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ'] [IsProbabilityMeasure μ''] [FiniteSupport μ] [FiniteSupport μ'] [FiniteSupport μ''] : Hk[map (prodMkLeft (T × T'') η ×ₖ prodMkRight T' (prodMkLeft T ξ)) (fun p ↦ p.1 - p.2), (μ.prod μ'').prod μ'] = Hk[map (prodMkRight T'' η ×ₖ prodMkLeft T' ξ) (fun x ↦ x.1 - x.2), μ'.prod μ'']

If `X` has identical distribution to `X₀`, and `X₀` has finite range, then `X` is almost
everywhere equivalent to a random variable of finite range.

name: independent_copies4_nondep_finiteRange

docstring: The product of a finite number of functions with finite range, has finite range.

name: full
signature: {Ω G : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω] [MeasurableSpace G] [MeasurableSingletonClass G] {X : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) [FiniteRange X] (μ : Measure Ω) : (μ.map X) (FiniteRange.toFinset X) = μ Set.univ

name: real_full
signature: {Ω G : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω] [MeasurableSpace G] [MeasurableSingletonClass G] {X : Ω → G} (hX : Measurable X) [FiniteRange X] (μ : Measure Ω) : (μ.map X).real (FiniteRange.toFinset X) = μ.real Set.univ

name: null_of_compl
signature: {Ω G : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω] [MeasurableSpace G] [MeasurableSingletonClass G] (μ : Measure Ω) (X : Ω → G) [FiniteRange X] : (μ.map X) (FiniteRange.toFinset X : Set G)ᶜ = 0

name: sum_meas_smul_cond_fiber'
signature: {X : Ω → α} (hX : Measurable X) [finX : FiniteRange X] (μ : Measure Ω) [IsFiniteMeasure μ] : ∑ x ∈ finX.toFinset, μ (X ⁻¹' {x}) • μ[|X ← x] = μ
docstring:
The **law of total probability** for a random variable taking finitely many values: a measure
`μ` can be expressed as a linear combination of its conditional measures `μ[|X ← x]` on fibers of a
random variable `X` valued in a fintype.
